---
title: "What I'm doing now"
date: 2026-06-09
---

* Currently undertaking a predoctoral research stay at the University of Bordeaux, where I am refining the analyses for my study on facilitative interactions between shrubs and oaks ([Que_facil Project](https://github.com/Eliot-MA/Que_facil)).

* Working on my upcoming poster for the 68th Annual Symposium of the International Association for Vegetation Science ([IAVS](https://2026gijon.iavs-meetings.org/)).

* Based primarily in Alcalá de Henares, Spain, where I work as a PhD researcher in the [Forest Ecology and Restoration Research Group](https://www.uah.es/es/investigacion/unidades-de-investigacion/grupos-de-investigacion/Ecologia-y-Restauracion-Forestal-Forest-Ecology-and-Restoration./#Miembros) at the [University of Alcalá](https://uah.es/es/).

* Working on a research article about desiccation sensitivity (recalcitrance) in acorns of European oak species.

* Always exploring new ways to share science. This blog is part of that exploration.
